sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Nullable(Float64));
SELECT visibleWidth(value) FROM test_table WHERE visibleWidth(NULL) == 0;
SELECT visibleWidth(name) FROM (SELECT name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery WHERE visibleWidth(name) == visibleWidth('');
SELECT id, visibleWidth(name) AS width FROM test_table GROUP BY id, visibleWidth(name) HAVING width == visibleWidth('Bob');
WITH (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS avg_value SELECT visibleWidth(name) FROM test_table WHERE value = avg_value;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT name, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT visibleWidth(name), COUNT(*) FROM temp_table GROUP BY visibleWidth(name) HAVING visibleWidth(name) == visibleWidth('Alice');
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT name, visibleWidth(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE visibleWidth(value) IS NOT NULL AND visibleWidth(name) == visibleWidth('Charlie');
